prompt: Show a paginated list of handovers with vehicle plate, driver, station, status, dates. 20 per page.
expected_avoid: MUI 7 DataGrid fresh import (MUI is declared but partial usage — do not force expansion)
assuming top-level pagination (nest-fleet has pagination NESTED inside data)
expected_use: src/components/Table — the existing in-house Table component
axios via src/services/api/handovers.ts (or matching service module)
envelope { data: { items, pagination } } from nest-fleet-service
Handover statuses ACTIVE / RETURNED — render as status pill via src/components/Badge equivalent
ApexCharts for any chart sidebars, react-toastify for errors, dayjs for date formatting (all existing deps)
expected_pattern_ref: Adaptation Layer — react-fleet-management-web (rules L435-440); Handover entity (rules L513); nest-fleet envelope nested pagination (rules L500, L623)
context_notes: Repo has MUI 7 declared but partial — sticking to in-house src/components/* keeps the surface consistent. Date formatting uses dayjs (already in repo), NOT moment or date-fns.
